attacking_style: Attacks from the bottom of climbs with sustained power efforts, capable of soloing 1-2km ascents. Shows late-race acceleration reserves, particularly in final kilometers of one-day races.
team_tactics: Primary role is high-tempo domestique work for team leaders—drills pace on key sectors (gravel, climbs) to set up protected riders. Occasionally inherits GC through team depth rotation rather than individual ambition.
terrain_preference: Short punchy climbs (1-2km) where sustained power can create separation. Handles gravel and technical sectors effectively. Late-race cobbled sections suit his speed reserves.
vulnerability: Technical descending under pressure—crashed while chasing attacks. Counter-attacks can inadvertently serve rivals rather than isolating them. Individual contribution masked in dominant team contexts.
key_patterns: Attacks from base of climbs, not late acceleration—wins built on sustained efforts (2 instances)
Elite domestique executing pace-setting on gravel/climbs for team leaders (2 race-critical instances)
Late-race bridging power in one-day races demonstrates superior speed reserves (2 observations)
Descending errors under race pressure compromise team tactics and individual results (1 crash)
Individual impact often invisible when team dominates—contribution masked by Sky/Ineos strength (2 races)
form_trajectory: neutral: 2021 shows strong domestique execution but descending crash raises questions. Peak form appears mid-season (June 2018) before fatigue sets in.
